nasb.text: You shall purify for yourselves every garment and every article of leather and all the work of goats’ hair, and all articles of wood.”

esv.text: You shall purify every garment, every article of skin, all work of goats’ hair, and every article of wood.”

cnv.text: 你們也要潔淨一切衣服、皮具、山羊毛織的物和木器。”

ccb.text: 也要洁净自己所有的衣服、皮具、山羊毛织的物品和木器。”
